name: The Doom of Eztli
intro_text: Inside the Eztli ruins, the air is thick with ancient magic. Glyphs pulse with a faint light along the walls, and the floor is littered with the bones of those who came before.
Somewhere deeper in the structure lies the relic Harlan seeks — but the ruins are not empty. The serpents that guard this place have stirred, and the very walls seem to shift against you.
Find the Chamber of Time before the Temple Warden awakens — and escape with your lives.
setup_instructions: Gather the Eztli encounter set and Doom of Eztli encounter set. The Rainforest set is not used in this scenario.
Place the Entryway (start revealed). Place all other locations face-down. The Chamber of Time is locked until Act 2 begins.
Each investigator begins at the Entryway.
Ichtaca is placed at the Chamber of Time as a guardian. She may become an ally depending on campaign log entries.
If the investigators carry any expedition supplies from Scenario 1, they may spend them as resources during setup.

resolutions.R1: You reach the Chamber of Time and claim the Eztli relic. The ruins begin to collapse as you flee into the jungle. Record in the campaign log: *The investigators took the relic from the Chamber of Time.* Each investigator earns 2 experience.
resolutions.R2: Ichtaca takes the relic before you can reach it and disappears into the jungle. The ruins collapse. Record in the campaign log: *Ichtaca claimed the relic.*
resolutions.defeat: The Temple Warden destroys your expedition. Each investigator suffers 1 physical trauma and 1 mental trauma.
